title: Drill & Blast Supervisor — 2/1 FIFO
description: Supervise drill and blast crews across two open pits. Requires shotfirer's licence, 5+ years supervisory experience, and a current WA driver's licence. 2/1 roster ex-Perth with charter flights.

title: Process Plant Operator
description: Operate crushing and flotation circuits at our copper concentrator. Residential role with local housing allowance. Control-room experience highly regarded; full training provided for the right attitude.

title: Exploration Field Assistant — Casual
description: Assist geologists with soil sampling, core cutting, and camp logistics on a remote lithium project. Casual day rates, camp accommodation provided. Manual driver's licence and 4WD experience essential.
